calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Continued To Feb-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adam DeLuca for Attorney Adam Ferguson on behalf of William Chaddock.

The Court noted that there has been no response to the Probate Examiner's notes that were faxed on December 9, 2019. Mr. DeLuca stated that it fell off their radar and requested a
35-day continuance to provide notice. The Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee is continued to February 24, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia P. Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
